purpose: Diagnostic-only conflict-set enumeration over admissible local birth candidates.

interpretation.single_birth_structurally_dominant: The best +1 subset is separated from alternatives and no local conflict/multi-birth ambiguity blocks exact promotion.
interpretation.hold_exact_promotion: The local candidate set still contains competing/conflicting explanations; exact promotion remains blocked.
interpretation.no_admissible_candidate: No local birth candidate cleared prior selection gates.
